titleStmt.title: SII 28.6: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 6. (A.R. No. 6 of 1913.) ARUMBĀVŪR, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: The body of priests (tiruv-ūṇṇāḻi-gaiyār tiruvaḍi-ppiḍippār) of Vempārnāḍu, Perambalūr-nāḍu, and Mulai-nāḍu forewent the kiḻvāra-kkāśu, chilvari and chiṟṟ-āyam (cesses) to which they were entitled) from the dēvadāna lands of God Vaḍa-kayilāyam-uḍaiyār of Arumbūr, so that the proceeds from these levies might constitute the capital for the upkeep (tiruppaṇi) of the temple of that God. The same group further granted similar cesses (to which they were entitled) from the tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam (lands in the enjoyment of Vishṇu temples) lands of God Kulōttuṅga viṇṇagaremberumāṉ in the temple of that Perumāṉ. It is stated that anyone causing obstruction to this would be a śiva-drōhi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Irācarāca tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 8 Āvatu mutal vempār nāṭṭu tiruvuṇṇāḻikaiyār tiruvaṭippiṭippārum
perumpalūr tiruvuṇṇāḻikaiyār tiruvaṭippiṭippāruma mulai nāṭṭu tiruvuṇṇāḻikaiyār tiruvaṭippiṭippārum Arumpār Uṭaiyār vaṭa
kayilāyamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tiruppaṇikku Uṭalāka Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉaṅkaḷāl vanta kiḻvārak kācum cilvari ciṟṟāyamum Iḻantu
tiruppaṇikku Uṭalāka viṭṭom Iṉṉāṭṭu tiruvuṇṇāḻikaiyār tiruvaṭippiṭippārom Ivvūr kulottuṅka viṇṇakare
m perumāṉ tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭattāl vanta kiḻvārakkācum cilvari ciṟṟāyamum Iḻantu Ivvūrrem perumāṉ koyil tiruppaṇikku
Uṭalāka viṭṭom Iṉṉāṭṭu tiruvuṇṇāḻikaiyār tiruvaṭippiṭippiṭippārom Itukku yilaṅkaṇañ colluvāṉ civatturokiyāvāṉ .
Digital edition of SII 28.6 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
